boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: customer data export with requester identity mismatch.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CTL record closes identity and scope match exactly
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: identity proof and requested data scope match resolved

critical_features_preserved: identity proof and requested data scope match
final_answer: CTL source record confirms exact identity proof and data scope match for this export. Boundary closed per policy. Operator may execute release. REQ and fallback notes do not override controlling record.
